lernziele:
• Understanding of 3D model data structures and its design processes.
  • Know how to analyze and deconstruct 3D models that will be used as inputs for machine learning.
  • Ability to implement neural networks using existing frameworks to recognize 3D models.
  • Ability to evaluate and compare different algorithms and models with regard to efficiency and effectivity.
vorausgKenntnisse: Digital Image Processing, Geometry, Computer Vision, Visual Computing, Computer Graphics or an equivalent class. Experience in C/C++ and Python programming language. Knowledge in machine learning algorithm.

kurse.lernziele:
• Familiar with the main working tools and concepts of stochastic modelling.
  • Ability to explain properties and limitations of stochastic processes as a modelling tool for noisy systems.
  • Ability to create model and analyze simple random phenomena using stochastic models.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Probability review: random variables, conditional probabilities, theorem of large numbers, central limit theorem.
  • Introduction to discrete and continuous stochastic processes.
  • Discrete, continuous and hidden Markov Chains.
  • Bernoulli, Poisson, Gaussian Processes, Brownian motion, white and coloured noise.
kurse.bibliographie:
• Sheldon M. Ross. Probability Models, Elsevier.
  • John A. Gubner. Probability and Random Processes for Electrical and Computer Engineers, Cambridge University Press.
  • Mario Lefebvre. Applied Stochastic Processes, Springer.
  • Bassel Solaiman. Processus Stochastiques pour L’Ingénieur, PPUR.

kurse.lernziele:
• Understanding of 3D model data structures and its design processes.
  • Know how to analyze and deconstruct 3D models that will be used as inputs for machine learning.
  • Ability to implement neural networks using existing frameworks to recognize 3D models.
  • Ability to evaluate and compare different algorithms and models with regard to efficiency and effectivity.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Digital image fundamentals and 3D model data structures.
  • Deep learning: Multilayer Perceptron, Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks.
  • Implementation of deep learning strategy using deep learning frameworks, in this case: TensorFlow.
  • Evaluation and comparison between models and architectures.
kurse.bibliographie:
• I. Goodfellow, Y. Bengio, A. Courville. Deep Learning, MIT Press, 2016.
  • C. M. Bishop. Neural Networks for Pattern Recognition, Clarendon Press. 1996.
  • Rafael C. Gonzalez & Richard E. Woods. Digital Image Processing, Pearson, 2018.
kurse.leistungsnachweis: Das zu bearbeitende Projekt wird mittels Bericht und Präsentation bewertet.
